name: release-infinitas-skill
summary: Guide agents through validation, review, promotion, and immutable release of infinitas-skill registry skills.
author: lvxiaoer
use_when: Need to validate or publish an immutable release for a registry-managed skill
Need to refresh stable release artifacts before other agents can install a skill
avoid_when: Need to install a released skill into a runtime directory
Need only search or inspect existing stable releases
runtime_assumptions: A writable infinitas-skill repository checkout is available
Signing configuration and allowed signers are already set up
